title: crotalaria rotundifolia
intro: Crotalaria rotundifolia, also known as Round-leaf Crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria rotundifolia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Crotalaria rotundifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
